reviews.comment:
Buena atención , no almorzamos pero se veían tentadores platos de comida. Es pequeño el comedor. Todo excelente

(Translated by Google)
Good service; we didn't have lunch, but the food looked tempting. The dining room is small. Everything was excellent.

reviews.comment:
Lavadero: PESIMA atención. Mil vueltas y excusas para terminar NO lavando el auto.
ME PREGUNTO PARA QUÉ PAGO LA CUOTA SOCIAL DEL ACA si, una vez que los necesito, ni siquiera están predispuestos a brindar servicio.

(Translated by Google)
Car wash: TERRIBLE service. A million excuses and they ended up NOT washing the car.
I WONDER WHY I PAY MY ACA MEMBERSHIP FEE if, when I need them, they're not even willing to provide service.
